acceptance_criteria: 206 while processing; 200 with full fields after processing; PUT updates description; another account's media returns 404; URLs are absolute
description:
Return media attachment status. While processing (width IS NULL): return 206 partial with null url/preview_url/blurhash. When complete: return 200 with full MediaAttachment including url, preview_url (thumbnail URL), width, height, blurhash, type (image/gifv/unknown). type=image for JPEG/PNG/WebP. type=gifv for GIF. PUT /api/v1/media/:id: update description (alt text).

AGENT WORKFLOW: Spawn a research subagent to poll a mastodon.social media upload in progress and document the 206 vs 200 response shapes.

TEST DISCIPLINE:
- Query while processing (width=NULL): returns 206 with null fields
- Query after processing: returns 200 with all fields
- PUT to update description: description updated in DB
- GET on another account's media: 404 (not 403 — Mastodon returns 404 to prevent enumeration)
- MediaAttachment.url and preview_url are absolute URLs (https://)

DEFENSIVE PROGRAMMING:
- Never serve media from another account via this endpoint (404 to prevent enumeration)
- type field: 'image' for still images, 'gifv' for animated GIF, 'unknown' if unrecognized
title: GET /api/v1/media/:id: return processing status, full attachment when done
